description: Vaivora weapon effect data for all Swordsman tree classes. Level 1 = base Vaivora, Level 4 = max enhancement.

design_patterns.linear_proficiency: Buffs existing rotation without changing rotation shape. Pure damage amplification or CD reduction.
design_patterns.gap_filling: Adds damage sources during CD gaps, converts downtime actions into damage, or creates reactive/counter mechanics.

skill_level_bonuses: All Murmillo skill level +1 (except Cassis Crista and Sprint)
passive_bonuses: Decreases penalty of Cassis Crista (Movement Speed 5->3, Evasion 25%->12.5%)

proc_mechanic.name: Arena
proc_mechanic.duration: Half of Frenzied Burst cooldown (maintained until next Arena)
effects: Final damage of Murmillo attack skills +30% inside Arena
Enemies outside Arena get [Fugitivo] debuff for 10s (not caster/monster)

level_4_effect.description: 2 Apparitions are summoned when enemy is hit by Headbutt and they cast Butterfly to the enemy (Cooldown 30 seconds). Doesn't cast when [Headbutt: Emperor's Bane] attribute is activated.

design_analysis.reasoning: Buffs existing rotation (+30% FD inside zone) without changing rotation shape. Apparitions add passive damage.

proc_mechanic.name: Assemble
effects: Enemies within range stunned for 1.5 seconds
Stamina of party members in range recovered by 20% when Flag of Vitality is cast
Party members in Flag of Vitality range become immune to removable debuff
Max 10 targets dragged toward flag for 3 seconds when Flag of Revenge is cast (1 second in PVP arena)

level_4_effect.description: Final Damage of Templar Skill increases +30%

design_analysis.reasoning: Utility/support Vaivora - stun, party sustain, CC. Level 4 is flat FD increase.

passive_bonuses: Decreases Cooldown of Ole by 10 seconds
Decreases Cooldown of Capote by 10 seconds

on_activation.name: Impalement
on_activation.trigger: Boss monster or enemy character uses attack skill within 150 range during buff
effects: Continual damage of Pierce property per every 1 second
Skill factor is 20% of Paso Doble at current level
Number of Continual damage strikes per debuff stack +1
Decreases damage received from debuff target by 6% per stack
Decreases Movement Speed by 4 per stack of debuff
Duration: 10 seconds, Max 3 stacks

design_analysis.reasoning: Reactive counter mechanic - DoT damage triggers from enemy actions during buff window. Fills gaps with passive Pierce damage.

Matador.notes: When Impalement is applied to a character, spear stabbing effect will show every tick

on_max_stacks.name: Payakaroon
on_max_stacks.trigger: Cast [Payakaroon] when casting Ram Muay at 12 buff stacks
effects: 10 consecutive hits with Strike damage to enemies in front
Total Skill Factor: sum of all Ram Muay attack skills
AoE Attack Ratio 10
Damage received during casting decreases by 70%
Immune to Knockback and Knockdown

level_4_effect.description: Te Kha, Sok Chiang, Te Trong Skill Factor 30% increased finally

design_analysis.reasoning: Stack counter builds toward big burst (Payakaroon). Rewards sustained rotation execution with a massive finisher. Level 4 buffs core rotation skills directly.

proc_mechanic.name: Especial
proc_mechanic.trigger: When enemy is hit by Lucha De Silla, Luchador master appears and casts [Especial]
effects: Luchador master charges to enemy, gives damage at approach (hits once)
Attacks twice by swinging arm
AoE damage by jumping in the air (hits 3 times)
Skill factor of Especial = 100% of current Lucha De Silla single hit
Hits total 6 times

design_analysis.reasoning: Auto-summon companion that repeats Lucha De Silla damage. 6 extra hits on trigger = pure damage amplification.

passive_bonuses: Cross Guard Block Rate increase effect +100%

proc_mechanic.name: Dual Sword
effects: Buff activated for 3 seconds while Cross Guard is cast
Maximum duration of Cross Guard during buff is changed to 3 seconds
Resisting all removable status ailments during buff
Cast [Reversal Slash] when succeed in Blocking during Buff

reversal_slash.trigger: Activated by enemy attack within 200 distance of the front
reversal_slash.restrictions: Cannot activate at [Magic Circle], [Continual AoE] skills
effects: Charge at the attacker
Divides Crosscut's skill factor of the current level * 200% into 4 times and hit

design_analysis.reasoning: Reactive counter mechanic - blocking triggers Reversal Slash (200% Crosscut SFR / 4 hits). Turns defensive skill into offensive window.

proc_mechanic.name: Escudo Espada
effects: Additionally hit [Escudo Espada] to 20 enemies in front when casting Montano
Enemy hit becomes afflicted with [Unbalanced] for 3 seconds (Except boss monster)
Skill factor equal to current level Montano

design_analysis.reasoning: Appends extra hit to Montano at same SFR. Pure damage multiplier on existing rotation.

passive_bonuses: Blossom Slash cooldown reduced by 15 seconds

proc_mechanic.name: Florescence
effects: Consecutively damages up to 4 enemies around the player

design_analysis.reasoning: CD reduction + AoE splash on Blossom Slash. Increases uptime of core skill.

proc_mechanic.name: Grind
effects: Use Quintain of the current level

level_4_effect.description: Joust Cooldown -10 seconds. Summon mounted troops and give damage to the nearby range when casting Joust. Skill factor = Gigante Marcha at current level, Number of hits: 10, Maximum Target: 10. Skill Factor changed to 50% of Gigante Marcha in PVP area.

design_analysis.reasoning: Appends Quintain to Crush cast. Level 4 adds mounted troop summon on Joust = extra damage sources on existing rotation.

proc_mechanic.name: Halberd
proc_mechanic.trigger: Using Dragoon skills against Large/Boss monsters
effects: Dragoon skill increases Final damage against Large/Boss monsters by 15%
Applies debuff for 5 seconds when accurately hits Boss monsters with Dethrone
Reduces damage received from target under debuff by 15%

level_4_effect.description: Throw Halberd around the designated range 4 times when Dragon Fall is cast. Halberd Skill Factor = 40% of current level Dragon Fall. Halberd AoE: 40, Maximum Target: 10.

design_analysis.reasoning: +15% FD against bosses (always-on for boss content). Level 4 adds AoE hits on Dragon Fall. Pure amplification.

proc_mechanic.name: Javelin
effects: Obtain 1 [Javelin] buff stack when casting Spear Throw
Maximum 3 stacks, Duration: 25 seconds
Throw Javelin to a single target within 250 distance by consuming 1 buff stack when giving basic attack
Skill factor of Javelin = current level Spear Throw
Number of hits: 6 times

design_analysis.reasoning: Converts basic attacks into 6-hit Javelin throws using stacks from Spear Throw. Fills gaps between skill CDs with basic attack procs.

passive_bonuses: Reduces cooldown of Sept Etoiles by 5 seconds
Reduces cooldown of Fleche by 10 seconds

level_4_effect.description: Activates Leventador when casting Balestra Fente. Hit the target within the passing range 10 times (Pierce property). Leventador Skill Factor: 10% of current level Balestra Fente. Maximum target: 10.

design_analysis.reasoning: CD reduction on core skills + Level 4 adds extra hits on Balestra Fente. Tightens rotation without changing structure.

proc_mechanic.name: Matchless
effects: Cast additional 2 attacks 3 seconds after the Rush channeling (Slash property)
5 hits per 1 additional attack
Skill factor equal to Rush of current level
AoE Attack Ratio of additional attack: 20
Additional Attack is not considered as channeling/casting

design_analysis.reasoning: Adds 2×5 hits after Rush channel ends (while you can already cast other skills). Fills the post-Rush gap with free damage.

proc_mechanic.name: Pounding Rage
effects: Attack by the main weapon type against the target within the range
Skill Factor: [Skill level] * 906%, Number of hits: 3

design_analysis.reasoning: Appends 3-hit attack to Warcry. Level 4 buffs Frenzy scaling. Straightforward amplification.

proc_mechanic.name: Rete Shooter
proc_mechanic.trigger: Using the first overheat of Trident Finish
effects: Applies Skill Rete debuff of current level

design_analysis.reasoning: Auto-applies net debuff on Trident Finish + CD reduction on Blandir Cadena. Streamlines rotation.

level_4_effect.description: Rush forward when Infinite Slash is cast and cast Skarphuggning twice in haste. Does not rush forward when distance from target is less than 100. Skarphuggning cast by this does not receive Saber's skill damage increase effect.

design_analysis.reasoning: +100% skill damage on two core skills + Level 4 adds free Skarphuggning casts on Infinite Slash. Direct amplification.

proc_mechanic.name: Serrated Shield
effects: Apply [Serrated Wound] and [Serrated Wound: Reduce Movement Speed] debuff on target for 4 seconds
Debuff duration increases by 4 seconds when target under [Serrated Wound] is hit by Shield Lob
[Serrated Wound]: Gives 25% of damage inflicted by Shield Lob every 1 second
[Serrated Wound: Reduce Movement Speed]: Movement Speed -20

level_4_effect.description: Only 80% of Guardian's skill damage decrease rate applied. Duration increase +100%. Does not stack with Skiaclipse Shield.

design_analysis.reasoning: DoT mechanic - Shield Lob applies bleed that ticks 25% of hit damage every second. Fills gaps with sustained damage.

proc_mechanic.name: The Dragon and The Tiger
effects: Enhance a certain property skill according to stance selected by [Stance Shift]
[Speed] stance: Pierce skill damage +10%
[Range] stance: Slash skill damage +10%

design_analysis.reasoning: Stance-based skill damage buff + flat FD increase at Level 4. Passive amplification.

passive_bonuses: Cooldown of Punish changed to 20 seconds
Changes Punish casting time to 1 second
Removes Knockdown target and moving to the targeted enemy function from Punish

design_analysis.reasoning: Completely reworks Punish into a spammable 4-hit AoE slash (20s CD, 1s cast). Removes knockdown penalty. Level 4 buffs Zwerchhau.
